channel.title: New American on Gourmand Syndrome
channel.description: Recent content in New American on Gourmand Syndrome

item.title: Napa Rose
item.description: Summary In our trip to Disneyland, we made a reservation here a month in advance on a Monday night thinking there will be a lot of people. Surprisingly (or unsurprisingly), there was practically no one in here. The dining room was pretty sparse. The bread selection was great. I loved the sourdough a lot, and how it all came out pretty hot.
